data.title: Positive CHMP opinion for Pfizer & BioNTech's LP.8.1-adapted COVID-19 vaccine in EU; for individuals 6+ to prevent SARS-CoV-2.
data.description: Pfizer Inc. and BioNTech SE have received a recommendation from the European Medicines Agency’s CHMP for marketing authorization of their adapted monovalent COVID-19 vaccine, COMIRNATY ® LP.8.1, targeting the LP.8.1 variant for individuals aged 6 months and older. The EMA’s Emergency Task Force advised updating vaccines for the 2025-2026 season to combat the evolving SARS-CoV-2 virus, stating that this adaptation will enhance vaccine efficacy. This move signifies a significant step in the ongoing efforts to prevent COVID-19, as the virus continues to mutate.

data.title: AAVE price tests $285 support post $50B TVL surge. Bearish trend at $285.26, key levels signal possible drop to $269.
data.description: The cryptocurrency AAVE is currently trading at $285.26 and is experiencing a bearish trend, despite its Total Value Locked (TVL) recently reaching a milestone of $50 billion. Analysis of key technical levels indicates a possible decline towards a support level of $269.

data.title: Temenos, a fintech company, recognized by CNBC as a top enterprise fintech in 2025, among 2000 global companies.
data.description: In Grand-Lancy, Switzerland, Temenos, a banking technology leader, was listed in CNBC's World's Top Fintech Companies for 2025 in the Enterprise Fintech category. The significant accolade, created with research firm Statista, highlights the top fintech firms influencing financial services. Temenos stood out after a thorough review of over 2,000 global fintech companies.

data.title: Tributes for wrestling legend Hulk Hogan and rocker Ozzy Osbourne rise as they both passed away, aged 71 and 76.
data.description: Renowned professional wrestler Hulk Hogan, whose real name is Terry Bollea, tragically passed away in a hospital on Thursday at the age of 71. This news comes shortly after the death of musician Ozzy Osbourne, who died at the age of 76.

data.title: Ether ETFs outperform Bitcoin for 6 days with $2.4B inflow. BlackRock's ETHA sees highest growth in assets.
data.description: In the recent six trading days, Ether exchange-traded funds (ETFs) saw an impressive influx of approximately $2.4 billion. Among these, BlackRock's ETHA emerged as the top recipient of this substantial inflow.
